message:
test(interactive): add 51 unit tests for slash command parsing and scoped model resolution

Introduce a dedicated test file for the public API surface of
src/interactive/commands.rs that was previously only covered by
integration-level TUI state tests. These focused unit tests exercise:

SlashCommand::parse():
- All canonical commands (/help, /clear, /model, /thinking, etc.)
- Alias resolution (/h → help, /m → model, /t → thinking, /q → quit)
- Case insensitivity (/HELP, /Model, /THINKING)
- Unknown command fallback to SlashCommand::Unknown
- Extra whitespace and argument passthrough

strip_thinking_level_suffix():
- Strips known suffixes (:off, :medium, :high, :max)
- Preserves strings with no suffix or only trailing colon
- Handles composite patterns like "claude-*:medium"

parse_scoped_model_patterns():
- Comma-separated, whitespace-separated, and mixed delimiters
- Trailing comma handling, empty input, single pattern

model_entry_matches():
- Exact match, case-insensitive match, glob wildcards
- Provider-qualified patterns (openai/gpt-4o)
- Non-matching patterns

resolve_scoped_model_entries():
- Glob expansion against available model list
- Multiple patterns, duplicates deduplication
- Empty patterns and empty available models edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
